info.title: Fretchen AI Image Generation Service
info.description: AI-powered image generation with NFT minting on Optimism/Base, paid via x402 USDC.
info.x-guidance: POST / with { prompt, tokenId, mode, size } and no payment header to receive a 402 with x402 v2 payment requirements (accepts[]). Pay in USDC on one of the offered networks, retry with the payment header, and the service mints/updates the NFT and returns its metadata and image URLs.

post.summary: Generate AI Image and Mint NFT (x402 USDC payment)
post.description: Generates an AI image using Black Forest Labs (BFL) API, uploads to S3, mints an NFT on Optimism/Base, and transfers it to the payer. Requires x402 USDC payment.

200.description: Image generated and NFT minted/updated successfully

402.description: Payment required. Body/headers (Payment-Required, X-Payment) carry the x402 v2 payment requirements to satisfy and retry with.

prompt.description: The text prompt for AI image generation

tokenId.description: The NFT token ID to update

mode.description: generate: create new image, edit: modify existing image

referenceImage.description: Base64-encoded reference image (required for edit mode)

metadata_url.description: URL to the NFT metadata JSON
